title: Improve and accelerate updraft bc computation.

body:
This PR:
 - Updates the RRTMGPInterface by:
   - Removing Pkg and NCDatasets deps from RRTMGPInterface, by passing a function, `data_loader`
   - Slightly modifying the `RRTMGPModel` args / kwargs

@dennisYatunin, this was a nice compromise, no need for the deps, and a much simpler interface change.

This is basically a peel off from #895, and will help us unify edmf pieces in with the dycore.
title: Move RRTMGPInterface into ClimaAtmos/src

body: This PR removes some edmf loops that we'd like to deprecate
title: Remove some k-loops

body: This PR is an attempt to fix a bug: we currently use these velocities before they are computed. The result is that, on main, velocities from the previous timestep are used, rather than the current timestep.
title: Compute velocities before they are used

body: This PR moves some code into `src/`, so that we can start unifying dycore and edmf types (a step towards #789).
title: Prep unifying dycore and edmf types

body: This PR adds an error for when the reference counter is incremented and the mse values are not updated. Doing so results in subsequent PRs to break because the mse and reference values are mismatched, putting the burden of future PR authors to fix the issue. This should help our workflow a bit.
title: Make sure mse values are reset when incrementing ref counter

body: This PR removes some now unused code in the edmf module
title: Remove unused code

body:
This code was migrated to [ClimaAtmosIdeas.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmosIdeas.jl)

I think this will help us with unifying things more (right now there are a lot of duplicate types, and we can't easily do replace-all since there are many matches in the experimental module).
title: Remove original ClimaAtmos code, moved to ClimaAtmosIdeas
